message:
To renew your Indian passport through CGI Johannesburg, please apply online and book an appointment at **https://passportindia.gov.in**. Choose the **Passport Renewal/Re-issue** option, complete the form, upload required details, and then attend your appointment at our office with your **current passport, photos, and supporting documents** (as per the checklist on the portal). Fees: **R800 (normal)** or **R1,600 (tatkal)**; processing time is typically **4–6 weeks (normal)** or **1–2 weeks (tatkal)**.  
If you need help, contact us at **cons.joburg@mea.gov.in** or **+27 11 783 0202** (website: **https://www.cgijoburg.gov.in**).
